languages.text: Духи машины спокойны, значит зенитные орудия работают без помех.

traits.locale_text: Духи машины спокойны, значит зенитные орудия работают без помех.

languages.text: The machine spirits are calm, which means the air defence battery is functioning without issue.
languages.original_text: Духи машины спокойны, значит зенитные орудия работают без помех.

traits.locale_text: The machine spirits are calm, which means the air defence battery is functioning without issue.
The machine spirits are calm, which means the air defence battery is functioning without issue.
The machine spirits are calm, which means the air defence battery is functioning without issue.

languages.text: Die Maschinengeister sind ruhig, das heißt, die Flugabwehrbatterie funktioniert ohne Probleme.
languages.original_text: The machine spirits are calm, which means the air defence battery is functioning without issue.

traits.locale_text: Die Maschinengeister sind ruhig, das heißt, die Flugabwehrbatterie funktioniert ohne Probleme.

languages.text: 机魂很平静，这说明防空炮组运转正常，没有出任何问题。
languages.original_text: The machine spirits are calm, which means the air defence battery is functioning without issue.

traits.locale_text: 机魂很平静，这说明防空炮组运转正常，没有出任何问题。

languages.text: Les esprits de la machine sont calmes. La batterie d'artillerie antiaérienne doit fonctionner correctement.
languages.original_text: The machine spirits are calm, which means the air defence battery is functioning without issue.

traits.locale_text: Les esprits de la machine sont calmes. La batterie d'artillerie antiaérienne doit fonctionner correctement.

languages.text: Los espíritus máquina están en calma, lo que significa que la batería antiaérea funciona sin ningún problema.
languages.original_text: The machine spirits are calm, which means the air defence battery is functioning without issue.

traits.locale_text: Los espíritus máquina están en calma, lo que significa que la batería antiaérea funciona sin ningún problema.

languages.text: Makine ruhları sakin. Bu da hava savunma bataryasının sorunsuz çalıştığı anlamına geliyor.
languages.original_text: The machine spirits are calm, which means the air defence battery is functioning without issue.

traits.locale_text: Makine ruhları sakin. Bu da hava savunma bataryasının sorunsuz çalıştığı anlamına geliyor.

languages.text: 機械霊は静かだ。つまり、防空砲は正常に機能している。
languages.original_text: The machine spirits are calm, which means the air defence battery is functioning without issue.

traits.locale_text: 機械霊は静かだ。つまり、防空砲は正常に機能している。
